title: Static mirror and GitHub Pages boundary
goal: Decide and implement the static mirror boundary: either render all safe read-only views into dist/site or explicitly bound/disable GitHub Pages so the documented mirror does not remain red and misleading.

acceptance.assertion: A documented decision states which Leitstand routes are supported in static mirror mode and which are dynamic-only.
build-static.mjs either emits the supported route set or docs/workflow clearly state the smaller supported set.
The failing GitHub Pages deployment is resolved by enabling Pages, making the workflow optional, or disabling/removing it with documented rationale.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub Actions status or diff review

metadata.priority_reason: P2: main Pages workflow is red; static docs overpromise
